templates.title: Pipe Operator — data lewat serangkaian fungsi
templates.description: pipe(data, f1, f2, f3) = f3(f2(f1(data))). Unix pipe style, left to right.

templates.title: Function Composer — f(g(x)) right-to-left
templates.description: compose(f, g, h)(x) = f(g(h(x))). Komposisi fungsi mathematical style, right to left.

templates.title: Currying Decorator
templates.description: Transform fungsi multi-argumen jadi curried: add(1)(2)(3). Partial application otomatis.

templates.title: Right Partial Application
templates.description: Applikasikan argumen dari kanan. partial_right(fn, 3, 4) — sisa argumen dari kiri.

templates.title: Maybe Monad Lite — handle None chain
templates.description: Maybe(data).get('key').get('sub').value — chain tanpa NullPointerException. Jika None di tengah, return None.

templates.title: Either Monad Lite — handle success/error
templates.description: Either.right(data) atau Either.error(msg). Chain operations tanpa try/except. Pattern untuk error handling.
